title: Consistent UX Controls and Group By on Reports/Dashboards Page
story: As a DataTools Pro user on the Reports and Dashboards page, I want the toolbar layout, folder navigation, and group by functionality to match the Metrics page pattern, so that the experience is consistent across all pages.
description:
Align the Reports and Dashboards page UX controls with the Metrics page pattern.

## Changes
1. **Folders**: Move folder navigation to the left sidebar
2. **Export icons**: Move to the right side like other pages
3. **Group By toggle**: Add a toggle icon after the search bar (matching Metrics pattern) with a different SVG icon style. Shows the Group By dropdown when toggled.
4. **Filter options**: Consistent with Metrics page
5. **Multi-select edit button**: Location updated to match relocated button positions

## Group By Enhancements
- Group by taxonomy (Line of Business, Topic, Folder)
- Rows without a taxonomy value grouped under "Without [Taxonomy Name]"
- Sorting option within groups (click group header to sort)
- Folder grouping hides the settings icon since Folder is not a category
- Same grouping enhancements applied to Metrics page
acceptance_criteria: Folder navigation moved to left sidebar
Export icons positioned on the right side
Group by toggle icon appears after search bar
Group by dropdown shows when toggle icon is clicked
Rows without taxonomy grouped under 'Without [Taxonomy]' label
Group headers are sortable on click
Settings icon hidden when grouping by Folder
Multi-select edit button position updated for new layout
Layout consistent with Metrics page pattern
ux_changes: Reports/Dashboards page toolbar aligned with Metrics pattern: folders in left sidebar, export icons right, group by toggle. Group by now labels unassigned rows and supports sorting within groups.
middleware_changes: Group by logic enhanced to handle rows without taxonomy assignments, labeling them 'Without [Taxonomy Name]'. Sorting within groups implemented. Taxonomy assignment for reports fixed (was only working for dashboards).
implementation_notes: Found that taxonomy assignment for reports was broken (only dashboards worked). Fixed the underlying issue. Enhanced DataTable grouping to label unassigned rows and add group-level sorting. Same enhancements applied to Metrics grouping.
comment_summary: Developer found taxonomy assignment was broken for reports (only dashboards worked). Fixed the root cause and enhanced grouping: unassigned rows labeled 'Without [Taxonomy]', group headers sortable. Folder grouping hides settings icon. Same improvements applied to Metrics page.
